positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial map featuring intertwining constellations, mythical stellar beasts, and abstract cosmic dust trails. The composition is centered, utilizing clean, thick silhouettes against a deep indigo void. The aesthetic is neo-Art Deco meets mystical scientific diagram, rendered with vibrant cyan, gold, and luminous purple gradients. High contrast, vector-illustration quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Emphasize geometric precision and wearable graphic appeal. Flat lay composition, intricate detail, deep contrast, tattoo flash style.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, logos, artifacts, messy, dirty, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grainy, cinematic, realism, photorealism
